description.ko: 순수한 에너지가 복잡한 유리 기하학을 통해 포착되고 굴절되는 빛의 분산에 대한 미니멀리즘 연구.
description.en: A minimalist study of light dispersion where pure energy is captured and refracted through complex glass geometry.

prompt: A high-precision optical render of PRISM-2, titled 'The Chromatic Pulse.' A complex geometric glass sculpture refracts a beam of white light into a brilliant spectrum of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint, and #8000FF deep violet. Soft #FFFF00 yellow caustic patterns dance across the dark background. Macro focus on internal light reflections and intense chromatic aberration. Minimalist aesthetic, 8k resolution.
